title: LR1110: create Renode peripheral model
description: Create LR1110.cs Renode peripheral similar to SX1262.cs. Intercept LR1110 SPI opcodes, bridge to lichen-sim. Key differences from SX126x: different command set, DIO9 interrupt line, built-in GNSS/WiFi (stub for simulation).
close_reason: Created LR1110.cs Renode peripheral based on SX1262.cs
